description: System integration reference for Vertex Solutions CSM workflow. Shows what data each system holds, which systems are currently connected, and what each existing integration actually exchanges.

data_held: Account records (name, ARR, contract tier, health score, renewal date, owner)
Activity logs (manually created: calls, emails, meetings)
system_profiles.data_entry_method: Primarily manual — CSMs create activity records by hand

notable_fields.ContractTier__c: Manual entry — not synced from DocuSign
notable_fields.RenewalDate__c: Manual entry — not synced from DocuSign
notable_fields.OpenTicketCount__c: Manual entry — not synced from Zendesk, frequently stale

system_profiles.primary_purpose: Support ticket management and SLA tracking
data_held: Support tickets (subject, description, status, priority, assignee)
system_profiles.data_entry_method: Tickets created by platform alerts or client submission; custom fields (SLA tier, CSM owner) entered manually by support agents

notable_fields.sla_tier: Custom field — manually entered by support agent, frequently blank or incorrect
notable_fields.csm_owner: Custom field — manually entered, not synced from Salesforce

data_held: SLA Addenda (response times, uptime commitments, credit provisions)
Order Forms (ARR, product scope, renewal terms)
system_profiles.data_entry_method: Documents uploaded and signed electronically; no outbound data sync to other systems

notable_fields.account_id: Populated on some contracts but not all — linkage to Salesforce is manual

data_held: Client-facing emails (escalation responses, follow-ups, QBR scheduling)
system_profiles.data_entry_method: CSM-authored; no outbound sync to CRM

data_held: Confirmed meeting bookings (attendees, date/time, meeting type)
system_profiles.data_entry_method: Bookings triggered by client action on Calendly link; no outbound sync to Salesforce or Zendesk

data_held: CSM-maintained log of upcoming follow-up obligations
Account notes not logged in Salesforce
system_profiles.data_entry_method: Manually maintained by each CSM; not connected to any other system

system_profiles.primary_purpose: Internal team communication and specialist routing
system_profiles.data_entry_method: CSM-authored; not connected to any system of record

existing_integrations.description: Platform errors and usage alerts trigger Zendesk ticket creation automatically.
Calendly links can be embedded in Outlook emails. Booking confirmation emails are sent via Outlook.
